title: stipa joannis f. asperior
intro: Stipa joannis f. asperior, also known as the lesser brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stipa joannis f. asperior include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in poultices to aid in wound healing.
